sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_nullable (id Int32, value String, nullable_value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_nullable VALUES (1, '-32769', NULL), (2, '32768', '500'), (3, 'abc', NULL);
SELECT id, toInt16OrDefault(value, CAST(-1, 'Int16')) AS int_value, nullable_value ? toInt16OrDefault(value, CAST(0, 'Int16')) : nullable_value AS computed_value FROM test_nullable;
CREATE TABLE test_aggregation (group_id Int32, value Float64);
SELECT group_id, SUM(toInt16OrDefault(value, CAST(0, 'Int16'))) AS total_value FROM test_aggregation GROUP BY group_id HAVING total_value > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_join (user_id Int32, status String);

SELECT j.user_id, j.status, CASE WHEN j.status IS NULL THEN toInt16OrDefault('invalid', CAST(-2, 'Int16')) ELSE toInt16OrDefault(j.status, CAST(-1, 'Int16')) END AS status_code FROM test_join AS j JOIN test_nullable AS t ON j.user_id = t.id;
SELECT value, toInt16OrDefault(value, CAST(-1, 'Int16')) AS converted_value FROM test_boundary WHERE toInt16OrDefault(value, CAST(0, 'Int16')) ? value : 'error';
SELECT j.user_id, j.status, IFNULL(toInt16OrDefault(j.status, CAST(-1, 'Int16')), 0) AS status_code FROM test_join AS j LEFT JOIN test_nullable AS t ON j.user_id = t.id;
